purpose: Visual quality review of the RGB-only Ground Truth inspection set; it is not a Gaussian label artifact.

views.note: The microwave front, silver housing, and adjacent counter boundary are clear.
The reconstruction is severely blurred and cannot establish rear ownership.

annotation_rule: Only usable views may provide target evidence. Insufficient views remain neutral and must not become negative evidence.
